Main - package Main
 
Main - Class in Main
Main class for starting the Task Manager system.
Main() - Constructor for class Main.Main
 
MyMinHeap<T extends Comparable<T>> - Class in PriorityQueue
Min-heap based priority queue implementation.
MyMinHeap() - Constructor for class PriorityQueue.MyMinHeap
Constructs an empty min-heap.
MyPriorityQueue<T extends Comparable<T>> - Interface in PriorityQueue
Interface for a priority queue data structure.
MyTask - Class in Tasks
Represents a task assigned to a user.
MyTask(MyUser, Integer) - Constructor for class Tasks.MyTask
Constructs a task for the given user with a specific ID.
MyUser - Class in Users
Represents a user with an ID and a priority.
MyUser(Integer, Integer) - Constructor for class Users.MyUser
Constructs a user with the given ID and priority.

P

poll() - Method in class PriorityQueue.MyMinHeap
Removes and returns the minimum element from the heap.
poll() - Method in interface PriorityQueue.MyPriorityQueue
Removes and returns the element with the highest priority (minimum for min-heap).
PriorityQueue - package PriorityQueue
 

R

runTheSystem() - Method in class TaskManager.TaskManager
Runs the main system: loads users and processes tasks.

T

TaskManager - package TaskManager
 
TaskManager - Class in TaskManager
Manages users and tasks using a min-heap priority queue.
TaskManager(String) - Constructor for class TaskManager.TaskManager
Constructs a TaskManager with the given configuration file path.

toString() - Method in class Tasks.MyTask
Returns a string representation of the task.
